content.headline: Design That Drives Results—UI/UX, Branding, Motion & More
content.subtitle: From user interfaces to brand identity and motion design—we deliver fast, scalable, and AI-assisted design across every touchpoint. Smart design, built to scale.

content.pitch: We help ambitious brands and product teams create world-class design—UI/UX, branding, and motion—that drives engagement, builds recognition, and scales with your business. Your vision. Our design expertise. Results in weeks.
content.tagline: Your vision. Our design expertise. Results in weeks.
content.author: DOTR Design Team

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Disconnected visuals across touchpoints—websites, apps, marketing—leading to a fragmented customer experience and diluted brand identity.

problems.title: Slow Design Cycles
problems.description: Lengthy feedback loops, endless revisions, and handoff friction between design and development delaying launches and eating into budgets.

problems.title: Generic, Template-Like Output
problems.description: Off-the-shelf templates and one-size-fits-all solutions that don't differentiate your product or resonate with your audience.

problems.title: Poor UX Holding You Back
problems.description: Confusing flows, high bounce rates, and low conversions because design wasn't user-centered or data-informed from the start.

content.empathy_text: We get it. Great design should be fast, consistent, and scalable—not a bottleneck. DOTR brings UI/UX, branding, and motion together with an AI-first approach so you ship better, sooner.

content.problem: Your design process is slow, inconsistent, or scattered across freelancers and agencies. Brand and UI don't align, and handoff to development causes delays and rework.
content.agitation: Every week of delay costs you users, revenue, and competitive edge. Generic templates and one-off assets dilute your brand. The longer you wait to fix it, the harder it gets.
content.solution: DOTR brings UI/UX, branding, and motion under one roof—with AI-assisted workflows and design systems that scale. We deliver in weeks, hand off cleanly to dev, and keep your brand consistent everywhere.

content.headline: End-to-End Design—UI/UX, Branding, Motion—Fast & Scalable
supporting_points: Full design stack: UI/UX, Graphic Design, Branding & Identity, Motion / Visual Design—one partner, no handoff chaos
AI-assisted design tools and workflows for faster iteration and consistency at scale
Design systems and components that plug into development (Lovable, modern stack) for seamless delivery
Brand-first thinking: every pixel supports your identity and business goals
Modular, CMS-driven content—every section and asset editable from admin, no redesigns for copy changes

content.description: We take your vision from early concepts to production-ready design systems. Our AI-assisted workflows and design–dev handoff ensure every screen, asset, and interaction stays on-brand and ships fast. Whether you need a full brand identity, a new app UI, or motion that brings your product to life—we've got you covered.

content.story: At DOTR, design isn't a silo—it's at the heart of everything we build. We combine UI/UX, graphic design, branding, and motion into one cohesive offering, powered by AI-assisted workflows and design systems that scale. From day one, we've believed that great design should be fast, consistent, and built to evolve with your product and brand.
content.mission: To deliver design that drives results: clearer identities, better experiences, and faster time to market. We help teams ship design that resonates, converts, and scales.
content.vision: To be the go-to design partner for brands and product teams who want end-to-end design—from strategy to handoff—without the usual agency friction.

sections.title: Design Services FAQ
sections.subtitle: Common questions about our design offering

items.question: What design services does DOTR offer?
items.answer: We offer four core design disciplines: UI/UX Design, Graphic Design, Branding & Identity, and Motion / Visual Design. You can use one or combine several—we deliver them as a cohesive design offering with shared systems and workflows.

items.question: How do you use AI in design?
items.answer: We use AI-assisted tools for exploration, variation generation, consistency checks, and speeding up repetitive tasks. Design decisions stay human-led; AI helps us iterate faster and keep quality high.

items.question: How fast can I get a first prototype?
items.answer: Typically within 2 weeks for UI/UX prototypes, depending on scope. Branding and motion timelines vary; we'll give you a clear timeline during discovery.

items.question: Do you work with our development team?
items.answer: Yes. We deliver design systems, specs, and assets that plug into modern stacks (including Lovable and Supabase). We can hand off to your dev team or work alongside our own development pillar for full design–dev alignment.

items.question: Can you handle both branding and UI/UX?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients start with brand identity and then move into UI/UX, or vice versa. Having both under one roof means no misalignment between brand and product design.
